mentals.text: MIND. ► Emotional. ► *Paroxysm of insanity ; she presses her head and pulls her hair; rests about six minutes, and then she begins again, with restlessness, complaining, and threatening; strikes her head with her hands, scratches herself, does not answer when questioned; threatening manners and speech; restlessness of the legs ; strikes her body, continues threatening; deep anguish, her clothes annoy her; continual restlessness, threatening words of destruction and death; she believes she is insulted; general trembling; pain in abdomen, relieved by pressure with her hands; she seems to listen, and answers with words and gesticulations; a mocking laughter, and joy expressed in her countenance. She comes out of this attack with a severe headache, eyes staring and wide open; she sees small figures hovering before her eyes, and moves her hands, [13] . ► Insanity on account of an unfortunate love, [13] . ► Great agitation, [10] . ► *Great excitement caused by music; one hour after it, general and copious perspiration , [13] . ► Dementia, with individuals inclined to sadness, and of a gloomy disposition, [13] . ►► *Hysteria , [13] . ► Severe attack of hysteria, lasting half an hour; increased by moaning; relieved by sighing, [13] . ► Hysteria, with bitter belching. Repeated yawning, which lasted from a quarter to half an hour, [13] . ► Beginning of insanity; they sing, dance, and cry, without fever, [13] . [10.] ► Ludicrous and lascivious hysteria in a woman of twenty-nine years; the patient had to be restrained by force, [13] . ► Visions of monsters or animals, that frightened him, [13] . ► Vision of different things not present, as faces, insects, ghosts, etc. The colors, red, yellow, and green, and particularly black, produce heavy mist before the eyes. Hallucinations, sees strangers in the room, [13] . ► Nervous crisis, more intense with women and girls, [13] . ► Feigned paroxysms; a girl simulating fainting and insensibility, looks sideways to watch the effect produced on those around her, [13] . ► Hysteria, with crossness, [13] . ► *Great taciturnity and irritability; desire to strike himself and others , [13] . ► Excessive gayety (in a young girl, fifteen years old, nervo-lymphatic temperament, who commenced to menstruate). Laughing at the slightest cause, [13] . ► Fourteen days after taking the medicine, the happy mood reached the borders of mania; the disposition to joke and laugh was extreme, [13] . ► Joy and strong emotion, with trembling, when seeing beloved friends or persons, [13] . [20.] ► The fourth day of taking the medicine, the moral troubles were relieved; gayety and disposition to laugh, [13] . ► Very good disposition the whole day, [13] . ► Happy mood and gayety in the street, disappearing on coming indoors and replaced by a deep sadness, [13] . ► Better disposition and mood soon after taking the medicine; little inclination to be angry, [13] . ► *Desire to joke, to play, and to laugh; extreme gayety , [13] . ► Lively and satisfied; disposition to joke, [13] . ► *Singing until becoming hoarse and exhausted , [13] . ► The musical air called "Tarantella," charms and pleases the person; he keeps time with his head, trunk, and limbs, [13] . ► Music cheers up, amuses, and relieves; the prover perspires, and experiences a general bruised feeling which disappeared with one dose of Zincum 200th, [13] . ► The patient laughs, dances, runs, and gesticulates, without noticing he is an object of astonishment, [12] . [30.] ► *Fits of nervous laughing , [13] . ► Laughter, followed by crying, with trembling of the limbs, [13] . ► Laughter that nothing can stop, followed by screams, [13] . ► Stupid laughing, followed by hiccough and spasms, [13] . ► Lamentation, with oppressive pain in the heart, as if a misfortune had befallen her. The inferior extremities are cold, with cramps, [13] . ► Weeping, with oppression and pain in the heart, as from a misfortune; cold and cramps in the lower extremities, [13] . ► Crying and yawning, with a feeling of weakness at the pit of the stomach, [13] . ► Crying spells without cause, [13] . ► Crying and moaning by the least contradiction; consoling words aggravate, [13] . ► Crying and moaning during the night, and getting up from bed, with severe headache, and oppression in the cardiac region, [13] . [40.] ► Excessive grief, accompanied in the afternoon by thoughts of death, [13] . ► Grief without any cause, [13] . ► Deep grief and affliction, with general trouble, nausea, and dizziness, compelling to lie down, [13] . ► *Profound grief and anxiety ; general trouble, uneasiness, and nausea, with dizziness, compelling to lie down, [13] . ► Sadness, dejection, and discouragement; ceasing during the evening, when eating, [13] . ► Sad, cross, and need of lying down, [13] . ► Sadness, lamentation, as if a misfortune had befallen him; with necessity of changing position and moving, [13] . ► Sadness, silent, with heaviness on the head, and sleepiness; yawning with muscular debility and dulness; bad taste in the mouth and coated tongue, [13] . ► (The indifference, the disgust for everything, and sadness produced by this medicine were present, particularly from morning until 3 P.M., with a marked aggravation after the middle of the day. From 3 P.M., until evening, the gay disposition returned again), [13] . ► (Sadness, grief, melancholy, and moral depression, are not only almost constant symptoms of the sting of Tarantula, but they have been also present, in a striking manner, during the different provings of this medicine), [13] . [50.] ► Not satisfied, desire of crying, in the afternoon, as if there was a very deep grief, [13] . ► Profound melancholy; sadness, with tears. (Relieved by Pulsat. 1000th). Then follows a ravenous appetite, longing for articles which were not relished before, [13] . ► Worried and greatly vexed, with much weeping, as if one could not realize something earnestly desired, [13] . ► Desire of lying down without any light, and without being spoken to, [13] . ► The patient presently becomes gloomy and morose, then falls into a state of moping, which can scarcely be dispelled, [11] . ► Fear of getting "typhus fever," [13] . ► Impatience, restlessness, and cross; strong desire to go to business, [13] . ► *Cross, tendency to get angry and to speak abruptly; is obliged to move the limbs , with tearing and pressing pains in the stomach, and in the left side of the chest; great thirst, with necessity of introducing his fingers into the mouth, [13] . [60.] ► Irritable and cross at the least contraction, [13] . ► Great irritability, rage, fury, loss of reason, desire to strike himself and those who prevent it. Skin smarts after scratching. (Relieved by Rhus tox.), [13] . ► Cross, with a good appetite, [13] . ► Change of temper, in a good-natured man, to the point of becoming intolerable; under the influence of sexual excitement he showed a better disposition and mood, [13] . ► Ennui, crossness, easily made angry, contrary to his habit and disposition, [13] . ► From the first there was an indescribable melancholy, anguish, and restlessness; peevishness, the attendants could do nothing to suit me; great haste in whatever I under took, from a constant fear that something would happen to prevent my finishing it; I would start up suddenly, and hastily change my position, through fear that something would fall on me; when walking I would stop short or suddenly throw my head to one side, through fear of striking it against some imaginary object which appeared to be suspended a few inches above my head. Great fear of an imaginary impending calamity. Great desire to be alone, with fear of being alone, even during daylight. Frightful visions as soon as the eyes were closed, with inability to sleep, [16] . ► Changeable mood, passing suddenly from sadness to gayety; from fixed ideas to uneasiness of mind, [13] . ► Alternated sorrow and gayety, with return of strength. The good effect of music continues, followed by a copious perspiration, [13] . ► Indifference. In the evening indifference about what is going on around; no attention paid to conversation, even if it be most interesting; cannot think about what has been said, [13] . ► Indolence and muscular weakness; yawning and stretching; dark, sad thoughts, increasing until afternoon, when, after an agreeable emotion, they changed into an excessive joy, which lasted all the evening, [13] . ► Intellectual. [70.] ► Dulness; the patient does not wish to answer the questions asked, [13] . ► Ennui, alternating with mirth, [13] . ► Weakness of memory; indolence for intellectual labor, [13] . ► Little intelligence and poor memory, [13] . ► Absence of mind, yawning and moaning, followed by cough, [13] . ► Afterwards he remembered hardly anything that had happened to him, [9] . ► Loss of memory, accompanied with good nature; changeable mind, tears, singing, and irresoluteness. (In a woman, twenty-six years old, who complained of violent sexual appetite), [13] . ► Complete loss of memory; she does not understand the questions addressed to her; she does not know the persons whom she sees every day; cannot say her prayers. Afterwards she is cheerful, followed by deep sorrow; feels like crying, sobbing, palpitation of the heart, oppression at the chest, headache, burning heat, and general perspiration, [13] .

head.text: HEAD. ► Vertigo. ► Giddiness, [11] . ► Vertigo on walking, [13] . [80.] ► Vertigo after breakfast, with a bad taste in the mouth, [13] . ► Sudden vertigo, in the air, on coming downstairs; repeating several times, [13] . ► Transient vertigo during the night, [13] . ► Vertigo, preceded by gastric symptoms, aggravated by carrying anything heavy on the head, [13] . ► Vertigo, rush of blood to the head, which feels heavy; sickness at the stomach, [13] . ► Different kinds of vertigo, and so severe that it makes him fall down to the ground, without losing consciousness, [13] . ► Vertigo in the evening, with cloudiness of the head, [13] . ► Vertigo, dizziness, malaise, belching, nausea, bloating of the stomach, gagging, and efforts to vomit, with vomiting of food, [13] . ► Dizziness, with severe pain in the cerebellum, [13] . ► Dizziness, accompanied with incomplete erection of the penis, and formication on the soft palate, [13] . [90.] ► Cloudiness of the head, with severe pain in the occiput, [13] . ► General Head. ► Contortions and extraordinary movements of the head and hands, with rage of nervous agitation, [13] . ► Necessity of moving the head from right to left, and to rub it against some object, with crossness, [13] . ► Heaviness in the head, particularly in the evening, [13] . ► Great heaviness of the head, and when waking up in the morning, preventing somewhat the opening of the eyes, and at the same time, pyrosis, [13] . ► After some fever, heaviness of the head, lasting eight days, [13] . ► Weakness of the head, [4] . ► Headache, with giddiness, when fixing the sight on any object, [13] . ► Headache when waking up, which compels to lie down again; sensation as if a hammer was striking the head, and the blows resounding in the throat, [13] . ► Headache, with burning heat, and general perspiration; oppression at the chest, and palpitation of the heart; sadness and desire to cry, [13] . [100.] ► Headache in the evening, increasing when running, [13] . ► When waking up in the morning, headache, as if it was knocked; with trembling, great sadness, cough, oppression of the chest, and prostration, until 9 o'clock, when the headache increased, affecting the throat and neck, with stiffness of the latter, [13] . ► Headache, similar to migraine, with impossibility to open the eyes, and tendency of the head to incline backwards, [13] . ► Headache when waking, as if the head was compressed with force, [13] . ► Headache during the night, with constant lancinating pains and whizzing in the ears, as if the blood was rushing into the head; after lying down he soon goes to sleep, but wakes up again with the same pains, which last all next day; a footbath in the night relieves him (thirtieth day), [13] . ► Pain in the whole head, more severe in the forehead, with heat and sweat, lasting all day, and an eruption of small pimples on the face and forehead (in an impubescent girl), [13] . ► Pains in the head and heart, with cough and nausea when waking up, [13] . ► Pain in the head and heart, with cough and nausea, in the morning when waking, [13] . ► Severe headache, with compressive pain in the heart; bitterness of the mouth, and thirst, [13] . ► Severe pain in the head, that go over the whole head to the temples and nose, where he experiences a sensation as preceding an epistaxis, [13] . [110.] ► Deep intense headache, with restlessness, compelling to move from one place to another; malaise and anguish, as if he was going to be dangerously ill. The pain flies to the forehead and to the occiput, with photophobia; a strong light compels to complain and to scream, [13] . ► Severe headache, with fear of losing reason, great dryness of the tongue, extreme uneasiness and malaise, [13] . ► Excessive headache all over, [13] . ► Pressing and hammering pains in the whole head, particularly on the right side, extending to all that side of the face, with anguish and sickness of the stomach, [13] . ► Headache, with a good deal of oppression, suffocation, palpitation of the heart, and prostration, [13] . ► Bruised and pressive pain in the head and chest, [13] . ► Pressive pain in the head, with a sensation as if the eyes were hopping or jumping, [13] . ► He wakes up with a pressive headache, the cause of which he assigns to the long dreams he has had, [13] . ► Compressive headache, lasting five hours, [13] . ► Compressive headache, towards evening, [13] . [120.] ► Compressive headache, with lachrymation and heaviness of the upper eyelids, [13] . ► Squeezing and lancinating pains in the head and uterus, [13] . ► Lancinating pains in the head, at night, near the right ear, [13] . ► On inclining the head downwards while sitting, slight and transient pain, as if produced by a very cold air, [13] . ► Headache, as if a large quantity of cold water was poured on the head; relieved by pressure, [13] . ► In the morning in bed, sensation as if cold water was poured from the head all over the body without any pain (forty-second day), [13] . ► Pain and heat in the head, on waking up, followed by alternation of cold and heat, with acute pain in the hepatic region, [13] . ► Headache, with burning heat, which extends to the face, and particularly the eyes, [13] . ► Headache, with burning heat in the abdomen, accompanied with sadness; indifference, and painful feeling at the dorsal and palmar surfaces of both hands, [13] . ► Great burning in the head; the hair troubles to the point of causing the desire to remove it; continually tossing of the head without finding a place where to rest it; the woman feels great impatience, uneasiness, restlessness, bad humor, oppressive breathing, and a desire to pull out her hair, [13] . [130.] ► Great burning in the head; the hair troubles to the point of causing the desire to remove it; continually tossing of the head without finding a place where to rest it; all these symptoms followed by great impatience, uneasiness, restlessness, bad humor, oppressive breathing, and desire to pull out her hair, [13] . ► Headache aggravated by the touch, which causes a very unpleasant sensation, [13] . ► Inclining the head forwards, aggravation of the frontal pain; if inclining backwards, aggravation of the pain in occiput; if sideways, aggravation in corresponding side of head, [13] . ► Forehead. ► Frontal headache, pain in the vertex and parietal bones, as if cold water was poured upon the head, with great noise internally, [13] . ► Headache, with pressure of the forehead; sickness at the stomach, and nausea during the night, [13] . ► Pain in the forehead and right side of head, [13] . ► Pain and burning for a moment, in the forehead, [13] . ► From 3 P.M. until 7 P.M., pain in the forehead, particularly in the right side, worse by leaning downwards and then a painful pressure, which extends to the eyes, is experienced (twenty-ninth day), [13] . ► Sharp pains in the forehead, with increased of heat, [13] . ► Pain in the forehead, with a pressive sensation in the bones of the nose, [13] . [140.] ► Constant pain in the forehead, sometimes with sensation of constriction of the nose, [13] . ► Lancinations in forehead and right temple, [13] . ► Stinging pain in forehead, and in the hypogastrium, [13] . ► Shooting and lancinating in the forehead and right temple, [13] . ► Shooting in the forehead, passing to the temples, [13] . ► Temples. ► Pain in both temples, while coughing, [13] . ► Pain in right temple, [13] . ► Pain in the right temple and side of the head during the night, accompanied with a disagreeable sensation, [13] . ► Neuralgia in the temples, [13] . ► Neuralgia in the left temporal region after twenty-four hours of taking the medicine (a young girl of fifteen), [13] . [150.] ► Lancinations in left temple, [13] . ► Lancinating, but transient pains in both temples, [13] . ► Lancination in both temples, during the night, [13] . ► In the evening, shooting in right temple, [13] . ► Shooting, during the night, in left temple, [13] . ► Vertex and Parietals. ► Pain in the superior, posterior, and lateral regions of the head, with a great deal of heat, [13] . ► Pain in the middle and superior part of the head, extending to the cheek-bones, with nausea, and desire to vomit, [13] . ► Heaviness of left side of head, [13] . ► Headache, particularly left side, affecting the left eye, [13] . ► Pain in the right side of the head (checked by Pulsatilla), [13] . [160.] ► Lancinations on the left side of the head, [13] . ► Lancinating pains in the left side, and in the right eye, [13] . ► Lancinations on the left side of head, in the morning, with itching of right ear, [13] . ► Severe shooting during the night, mainly on the left side of head, [13] . ► Occiput. ► Pain extending to the posterior part of the head, with necessity of shutting the hands, which relieves, [13] . ► Headache in the occiput and temples, when coughing, as if striking with a hammer, [13] . ► Pain in the occiput, as if striking it with a hammer, extending to the temples, [13] . ► Intense pain in the occiput, with burning thirst, [13] . ► Pain in the occipital region, as if a nail was driven in, [13] . ► Compressive pains in the posterior part of the head, extending towards the neck (relieved by Aconite), [13] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Tarent.
Intense pain, as if thousands of needles were pricking into brain. Vertigo. Wants hair brushed or head rubbed

nose.text: NOSE. ► Sneezing and coryza, [13] . ► Coryza of the right nostril, and shooting sensation, radiating to the top of the head, [13] . ► Slight epistaxis, [13] . [240.] ► While washing the face, some drops of blood from the left nostril, [13] . ► Profuse hæmorrhage from the nose, the amount of blood lost measuring over one pint; the blood discharge was almost black, each drop coagulated, and sank at once, like a bullet, to the bottom of a vessel partly filled with water, and formed a large black clot (third day), [16] . ► Sensation of constriction in the nose, [13] . ► Two hours after taking the medicine in the morning, great itching in the left nostril and frequent sneezing, as after taking snuff, [13] .

face.text: FACE. ► Countenance expressive of terror, [10] . ► Face pale, earthy color, in strong contrast with the nearly purple neck, [16] . ► Bruised pains in the bones of the face, [13] . ► (Cancer on the cheek, lower lip, or nose, in the beginning?), [13] . ► Flushed cheeks, with burning heat in the head; burning heat and sweat in the palms of the hands, [13] . ► Burning, scorching sensation in the lips, as after a fever, [13] . [250.] ► Pains in the right or left angle of the inferior maxilla, and so severe as to think he is going crazy, [13] . ► Pain in the direction or the right inferior maxillary nerve, with a tickling sensation in the stomach, dizziness, vanishing of sight, and buzzing in the ears, of short duration, [13] . ► Pain in the inferior maxilla, as if all the teeth were going to fall out; neither cold or heat relieves, [13] .

mouth.text: MOUTH. ► Teeth. ► Toothache, with sensation of formication, as if an insect were running in them, [13] . ► Pain in the teeth, with hiccough, without being carious, [13] . ► Pain in all the teeth, as if they were loose, and momentary sensation as if an electric spark passed through them; at the same time constrictive pain in the nose, with throbbing in the eyes and orbits, [13] . ► In the evening, pain in the teeth and right cheek, as after a very cold sensation or impression, [13] . ► Dull pain in all the teeth, with smarting in the mucous membrane of the buccal cavity, [13] . ► Tearing pain in all the teeth, as if they were pulled, with burning heat and perspiration, which falls in drops from the face, [13] . ► Tearing pain in the upper teeth, as if pulled; more intense in the right side, [13] . [260.] ► Slight pain in all the left upper teeth when coming in contact with the air, in the morning (in a girl 24 years old, of a nervous constitution), [13] . ► Slight pain in the roots of the incisors and molars, increasing when coming in contact with each other; gastric symptoms, [13] . ► Slight pulsating pains in the right superior canine during the night, [13] . ► Pulsating toothache, causing involuntary distortions of the countenance, [13] . ► Convulsive throbbing pain in all the teeth, with weeping and sadness, [13] . ► Gum. ► The gum of the incisors and first molars continually bleeds, [13] . ► Tongue. ► (Cancer of the tongue, in the beginning, with or without fetid breath?), [13] . ► Very painful aphthæ on the tongue, [13] . ► A spot or patch at the base of the tongue, a kind of aphthous ulcer the size of a lentil, [13] . ► A patch on the tongue near the uvula; a kind of small aphthous ulceration, with a fetid breath, [13] . [270.] ► Tongue coated dark brown, edges and tip fiery red, [16] . ► Tongue moist, [10] . ► Dryness and roughness of the tongue from the evening until breakfasttime the next morning, [13] . ► The patient said her tongue was drawn backward, so that on attempting to speak she could not utter a word, [2] . ► General Mouth. ► A white patch on the palate, with a tendency to enlarge, [13] . ► A patch of a suspicious, cancerous nature, in the mouth and on the fauces, [13] . ► Dryness and bitterness of the mouth, with great thirst, [13] . ► *Great dryness of the mouth and teeth , as if they had never been moist, [13] . ► Slight constriction in the posterior palatine arch, with some pain when swallowing, [13] . ► A sensation in the mouth, tongue, and palate, similar to the taste of cream of tartar; and in the throat, as if drops of cold water were constantly falling down, [12] . [280.] ► Excoriating pain in the palate since morning, particularly when eating, [13] . ► The palate feels as if scalded, and as if the epithelium was removed, [13] . ► The same preceding symptom in the mouth and throat, with burning and smarting, and, at the same time, pain in the sacral region and left half of the scrotum, [13] . ► Taste. ► Very bad taste in the mouth all day; feeling of dryness of the tongue, though it was moist, [13] . ► Flat taste, [13] . ► Sour and flat taste in the mouth, in the morning; food has a sour, salty, and piquant taste, [13] . ► Bitterness in the mouth and thirst, with pressive pain in the præcordial region, and severe headache, [13] .

throat.text: THROAT. ► Sore throat when swallowing, at the same time shooting in left eye, [13] . ► Sore throat on right side, when coughing, during the whole day, [13] . ► Sore throat when coughing, with slight redness of the mucous membrane, [13] . [290.] ► Pain in the throat when talking, yawning, coughing, and swallowing, [13] . ► Slight itching in the throat, with a dry cough, [13] . ► Painful constriction of the throat when swallowing, with aggravation of the mouth symptoms, when smoking, [13] . ► Sensation on swallowing of constriction in the throat, [13] . ► Sensation in the throat as if cold water was constantly dropping down; also a taste of cream of tartar in the mouth, tongue, and palate, [13] . ► Severe throbbing sore throat, as if striking on it, [13] . ► Tonsils. ► Painful swelling of right tonsil not interfering with deglutition, [13] . ► Painful constriction in the right tonsil, extending to the ear, and aggravated by swallowing, [13] . ► Pressing pain in the tonsils, with yawning; necessity of stretching, with cutting pain in the left lung and heart, [13] . ► Pain in the tonsils and throat, with great heat, uneasiness, and movements of the head, [13] . [300.] ► Painful shooting in the right tonsil, radiating through the cerebrum and left side of head, [13] . ► Fauces. ► Fauces inflamed, swollen, purplish hue; deglutition very difficult, as if from partial paralysis; on attempting to swallow, was obliged to make several unsuccessful efforts, [16] . ► Swallowing. ► Painful swallowing, [13] . ► External Throat. ► Throat commenced to swell externally (after eight hours), [13] . ► The finger became somewhat inflamed, with intolerable burning and itching in the vicinity of the scratch (after twenty-four hours); the symptoms continued to increase from this time, and on the third day they became fully developed; slight enlargement of the axillary glands, which were sensitive to touch; submaxillary and cervical glands much swollen and very sensitive, the least pressure causing intense pain; the neck was swollen anteriorly in a line from the chin to the sternum, and posteriorly in a line from the occipital protuberance to the scapulæ, dark red, nearly purple. I can convey no better ideas of the rapidity with which the swelling progressed than by mentioning that on the morning of the third day after inoculation, I had on a fourteen and a half inch collar, my usual size; at 10 A.M. I replaced it with one an inch larger; at 12 M. I again changed for one still an inch larger, which I was obliged to remove at 3 P.M., as the neck was so swollen that I was in danger of choking; the swelling continued to increase until evening, when it was much relieved by a profuse hæmorrhage from the nose, [16] . ► Swelling of one of the cervical glands of left side of neck, painful when coughing, and lasting the whole night, [13] . ► Constant dull throbbing pain in the cervical submaxillary glands, with occasional sharp stinging pains, [16] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Tarent.

abdomen.text: ABDOMEN. ► Hypochondria. ► Swelling of the hypochondriac regions, with general weakness; difficult digestion, [13] . ► Swelling of the hepatic region and of all the abdomen, with paleness and a yellow tinge of the skin, [13] . ► Gas in the hypochondriac regions; loss of appetite; constipation; pain in the limbs; manifest impossibility to digest, with fear of eating, [13] . ► Pain in one or the other hypochondrium, worse from breathing heavily, when running, and eating, [13] . ► Pain in the hypochondriac regions, in the morning while in bed, renewed several times after getting up, [13] . ► Pain in the hypochondriac regions, as with some women before menstruation, from 3 to 5 P.M., frequently occurring till the appearance of the catamenia, but the pain diminished during menstruation, although the medicine was continued, [13] . ► Acute pain in the hypochondrium and umbilical region, [18] . ► Pain in both hypochondria, repeating several days, [13] . [390.] ► Constrictive pains in both hypochondriac regions, [13] . ► *The hepatic region is painful to touch ; pain in the middle of the right side of the back; difficult digestion, increasing every day, and extreme languor, [13] . ► Acute pain in the hepatic region, with alternation of heat and cold, [13] . ► Cramplike pain in the liver, with necessity of stretching, [13] . ► Pain in the right hypochondrium; lancinations in the epigastrium, with painful malaise, [13] . ► Shooting and lancinating in the right hypochondrium, in the morning, [13] . ► Pain in the left hypochondriac region, back, and arm of the same side, [13] . ► Lancinating pain in the spleen, with pain in the stomach and uterus, [13] . ► Pain in the left hypochondrium, and in the shoulder and arm of the same side, [13] . ► Umbilicus and Sides. ► Pain in the umbilical region, with a sensation of anguish, [13] . [400.] ► Sharp acute pain in the umbilical region, with pain in the calves, preventing free movements when walking, [13] . ► Stinging and pain, as if ulcerated, at the left of the umbilicus, circumscribed and very severe, lasting only five minutes, [13] . ► Pain in the right side of abdomen, [13] . ► Frequent shooting pain in both sides of abdomen, from 8 P.M. till 11 1/2 P.M., [13] . ► General Abdomen. ► Bloating of the abdomen, increasing after eating, to the point of feeling the dress very uncomfortable, [13] . ► Bloating of the abdomen, with gastric symptoms, [13] . ► Infiltration of the parietes of the abdomen, [13] . ► Great rumbling, produced by gas, in the abdomen and uterus, [13] . ► Rumbling in the abdomen and pain in both sides of abdomen, particularly in the left, and at the time menstruation ought to appear, [13] . ► Borborygmus, with colic, crying, and moaning, relieved by pressing with both hands on the abdomen and sides of the chest, [13] . [410.] ► Much borborygmus, obliging to move the legs, with restlessness of the body, [13] . ► Some pains and borborygmus in both hypochondria, about 3 P.M., [13] . ► A sensation of weakness in the abdomen, as if he was going to faint, in the evening, relieved by sitting down, [13] . ► Pain in the abdomen, with a sensation of anguish, [13] . ► Painful sensation in the abdomen, with anguish, towards evening, [13] . ► Pain in the middle of the abdomen, increasing by pressure and riding on horseback; general heat; the pain lasts from 8 1/2 P.M. until 2 P.M., and is followed by smarting in the anus, burning in the urethra, forearms, and legs, [13] . ► Pain in the abdomen, as from colic, followed by vomiting of food, [13] . ► Pains in the whole abdomen when at stool, [13] . ► Pain in the abdomen, relieved by bending double, [13] . ► Pain in the abdomen when walking, relieved by pressure, by standing still, and bending double, [13] . [420.] ► Pain in the abdomen, with a very disagreeable sensation, which he could not explain, [13] . ► Pain in the abdomen, as in nervous colic affecting the uterus, [13] . ► Pains in the abdomen, extending to the chest, where they become very severe, with rumbling of gases in the bowels, forming elevations in different parts of the walls of the abdomen, followed by fatigue, lassitude, oppression, and crampy pains in the lower extremities, particularly the thighs, [13] . ► Pain in the abdomen, like colic, with bloating, dryness of the mouth, tongue, and throat, [13] . ► Violent pain in the intestines, with numbness and bloating, [13] . ► Violent and burning pain in the abdomen and uterus; the latter feels as if it was going to drop when walking, [13] . ► Meteorism, [13] . ► In the morning, griping pains in the abdomen, [13] . ► Griping and cramplike pains in the abdomen when coughing, [13] . ► Dull colicky pains, drawing, tenacious, as if coming from the kidneys, compelling to stretch, and relieved after urinating, [13] . [430.] ► Colic, with swelling of the abdomen, pain in the right groin, desire to urinate, profuse and liquid micturition, giving to the analysis a considerable quantity of sugar, [13] . ► Intense colicky pains (after two hours), soon followed by fever, then fatal symptoms, [5] . ► Colicky pains, running over the whole abdomen, with a great deal of flatus, which cannot be expelled, [13] . ► In the morning, colicky pains, with a sensation as if a very light body was ascending from the stomach to the chest, [13] . ► The colic and borborygmus increased every evening (relieved by Acon.), [13] . ► Violent colic, awakening him, with oppression and much borborygmus, [13] . ► Colic, changing the mood into an agreeable one, [13] . ► Stinging-cutting pain, as if from colic, around the umbilicus, [13] . ► Shooting pains in the abdomen, anus, and vagina; shooting pain in the left side of the abdomen, [13] . ► Frequent shooting pains in the abdomen, in the evening (twenty-fifth day), [13] . [440.] ► When walking, a sensation as if the intestines were not well attached and were going to fall down with the least movement; however, movement does not aggravate or relieve the sensation, [13] . ► Burning heat in the anterior part of the abdomen, more intense in the umbilical region, [13] . ► Burning heat in the anterior part of the abdomen, with headache, indifference sadness, and painful sensation in the dorsal and palmar surfaces of both hands, [13] . ► Muscular throbbing in the abdomen, with general trembling and sadness, as if having committed a great fault, [13] . ► Hypogastrium and Iliac Regions. ► Fibrous tumor in the hypogastrium, compressing the genital organs, causing different derangements and uterine discharges, [13] . ► Fibrous tumor in the lower abdomen, with discharge of a pale blood from the uterus; weakness, oppression, palpitation of the heart; impossibility to stand or to lie down; the patient can only rest when sitting on her bed, [13] . ► Pain in the hypogastrium, in left side of abdomen, and in the pubis, [13] . ► Pain in the hypogastrium, followed immediately by liquid stools, [13] . ► Pains in the hypogastrium, hips, and uterus, as if these parts were compressed; at the same time, unconquerable sleepiness, [13] . ► Pain in the lower abdomen, even to touch; it seems as if the uterus was the seat of the pain, but it is in the bladder, [13] . [450.] ► Pain in the lower part of abdomen, [13] . ► Burning pain in the hypogastrium and uterus, with sensation of great weight, interfering with walking, as in prolapsus, and causing pruritus at the vulva. (These pains were relieved by the olfaction of Moschus; the hysteralgia, with colic and borborygmus, by Magn. carb.; the crampy and expulsive pains from the sacrum to the uterus, as in abortion, by Cuprum; the incontinence of urine, brought on by the least movement, laughing, coughing, etc., and even without these circumstances, by Chelidonium), [13] . ► Shooting pain in lower part of abdomen and in the scapula, [13] . ► Shooting pain in the pubis, extending or radiating to the anus, [13] . ► Shooting pain in the left groin, [13] . ► Tearing pain in the groins, as if caused by a rupture, worse when coughing; is obliged to hold the groins with the hands, [13] . ► Pain in the groins, with a relaxed sensation, [13] . ► Pain in the groins, particularly the right, as from a rupture, [13] . ► The pains in the groins, simulating a rupture, are aggravated by cold water, [13] .

rectum.text:
RECTUM AND ANUS. ► Pain and burning in the anus after stool, [13] . [460.] ► Repeated shooting in the anus, [13] . ► Violent efforts to have a passage; hard stool with blood; pain and smarting in the anus, [13] . ► Unsuccessful efforts to stool; tenesmus, followed by three scanty passages, [13] . ► Tenesmus and colic; pressure in the abdomen and uterus, [13] .
STOOL. ► Diarrha. ► Profuse diarrha with prostration, [13] . ► Profuse diarrha, with great prostration, sadness, complete indifference, and little inclination to speak; the diarrha lasted from two to three days, [13] . ► Stools three or four times daily, very dark, fetid, partly formed, containing much mucus, expelled with difficulty, and followed by smarting and burning at the anus, but no tenesmus; stools always occurred immediately on having the head washed, [16] . ► Liquid passages, [13] . ► Bloody stool, followed by pain and smarting in the anus, [13] . ► Constipation. ► *Constipation , [13] . [470.] ► Constipation, with a difficult passage; burning pain after passing some blood, [13] . ► Constipation, with involuntary emission of urine when coughing, laughing, or making any bodily effort whatever, [13] .

urinary.text: URINARY ORGANS. ► Kidneys. ► Weakness in the region of the kidneys, preventing standing; hollowness of head; prostration; forgetfulness, [13] . ► Indescribable derangement in the kidneys, bladder, and genital parts, ceasing after the passage of a brown fetid urine mixed with small calculus, [13] . ► Pain in the kidneys, caused by vesical calculus, with desire to urinate, which cannot be satisfied, [13] . ► Pain in the kidneys; the bladder seems swollen and hard; difficult urination; emission by drops, with burning, [13] . ► Pain in the kidneys; renal colic, ceasing after urinating, [13] . ► Dull pain in the kidneys; the legs give way suddenly, and feel as if detached from the body, [13] . ► Pain in the kidneys, with a debilitating sensation; pain in the legs, necessitating sitting down, [13] . ► Pain in the region of the kidneys, [13] . [480.] ► Pain in the kidneys all the day, [13] . ► Pain in the kidneys and hips, in the evening, [13] . ► Pain in the kidneys, with a very disagreeable sensation, during the forenoon, [13] . ► The kidneys are painful, even to touch, with sensation of soreness, debility, prostration, and dulness, [13] . ► Intermittent pain in the left kidney, in the morning, [13] . ► Shooting in the right kidney, [13] . ► Shooting pain in the kidneys late at night, [13] . ► Shooting in the right kidney, in the night while in bed, [13] . ► Shooting and gnawing pains in the kidneys (sixteenth day), renewed every twenty-four hours for fifty-six days; these pains lasted sometimes one or two hours, but generally a quarter or half an hour; particularly in the afternoon and night, [13] . ► Sticking pain in the kidneys; general debility without any apparent cause (the appetite and digestion normal); the strength gives way suddenly, [13] . [490.] ► Trouble in the kidneys without any appreciable cause, [13] . ► Bladder. ► Cystitis, [13] . ► Swelling of the bladder, reacting on the uterus, as if this organ was violently displaced; general debility, particularly of the legs, when walking; yellow complexion, [13] . ► Inflammation of the bladder, violent fever, excruciating pains, together with gastric derangement, [13] . ► The bladder seems to acquire an enormous development; difficult passage of a dark-red urine, with a gravel-like sediment, [13] . ► Feels the bladder as if squeezed; spasmodic action of this organ, debilitating the patient, and pains in the thigh, relieved by rubbing, [13] . ► Pains in the bladder and impossibility to pass the urine; hæmaturia, [13] . ► Pain in the bladder, extending to the uterus, and causing derangement in that organ, [13] . ► Severe pains in the bladder, with distension; cannot walk, but does not suffer much, [13] . ► Urethra. ► Burning in the urethra, during and after micturition; indifference, alternating with happy mood, [13] . [500.] ► Tearing pain in the urethra after urinating, but when the pain ceases, the desire to urinate returns, [13] . ► Diabetes , [13] . ► Micturition and Urine. ► Profuse micturition, [13] . ► Profuse micturition, sweating, weakness of the legs, and emaciation, [13] . ► Profuse micturition, fatigue of the body, and weakness, [13] . ► *Involuntary emission of urine when coughing, laughing, and making any effort whatever; constipation, [13] . ► Incontinence of urine when coughing, and during any movement requiring some effort, with bowels regular, for eight days, [13] . ► Urine scanty, high-colored, and passed with such difficulty that on several occasions it seemed that I must resort to a catheter; the urine, after standing, showed a dense precipitate, [16] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Tarent.

respiratory.text: RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Larynx. ► Roughness in the larynx and trachea, with some dry cough, and smarting in the eyelids, [13] . ► Sensation of roughness and scraping in the larynx and trachea, with smarting in the eyelids, and indifference, [13] . ► Dryness, scraping in the larynx and trachea, with frontal headache, [13] . ► The patient was unable to speak a word, and pointed to the larynx as the seat of the trouble, [12] . ► Voice. ► Aphonia, with increased difficulty of breathing, [2] . ► Hoarseness, [13] . ► Cough and Expectoration. ► Cough, shortness of breath, oppression, and prostration until 9 A.M., [13] . [580.] ► Painful cough, and sensation of dryness in the chest; laziness, languor, sadness, and fear of running into consumption, [13] . ► Cough, with gagging; cough produces distensive pains in the head, chest, and uterus, with sadness and anxiety; but when walking in the open air, a sensation of happiness (tenth day), [13] . ► Cough, when getting out of bed, with vomiting, and involuntary emission of urine, [13] . ► Cough, with pain in the left side of chest, extending to the arm of the same side, [13] . ► Cough, with desire to raise something, but without succeeding, [13] . ► Cough, excited by smarting in the throat, and bronchiæ; worse at night, [12] . ► Cough, when getting up from bed, and nausea, on account of the efforts to raise the mucus in the chest; pain in the false ribs of the left side, [13] . ► Cough, when waking, with retching, and pain in the head and heart, [13] . ► Dry harsh cough, with oppression in the chest, followed by two soft and burning stools, with pain and smarting in the anus, [13] . ► Dry cough, in the morning, as in the beginning of phthisis, [13] . [590.] ► Dry cough, with a slight smarting in the throat, [13] . ► Dry, fatiguing, and convulsive cough, with retching, in the night, in bed, relieved by smoking; when waking up, hoarseness, with sensation of roughness in the chest and throat, [13] . ► Dry cough, in the morning (in a woman of twenty-six years); in the evening it is more frequent and spasmodic; hoarseness, roughness in the larynx and trachea, and pain in the front part of the chest; frequent pulse, increased heat; dizziness, pain in the whole head, and smarting in the eyes; thirst, but water disagrees; want of appetite; heat in the abdomen; shaking chills in the back; convulsive spasms in the posterior part of the trunk, thighs, and legs; general lassitude, indifference, and poor memory. These symptoms, which lasted for several days, increased from 5 P.M. till 5 A.M., with sleeplessness and malaise, in bed. This woman experienced, at the same time, violent and constant sexual appetite, [13] . ► Frequent coughing, dry in the beginning, and followed afterwards by an abundant expectoration of tough, whitish mucus, of a salty taste, [13] . ► Dry painful cough, with a very thick and yellow expectoration; pain at the base of the chest; indifference and laziness, [13] . ► Loose cough, with expectoration; great oppression; pain in left lung, with a sensation as if the back was pressed against the chest (relieved by Bovista), [13] . ► Loose cough, scanty expectoration; great fatigue and oppression in the chest, as if smothering; general perspiration, particularly on the head and chest, [13] . ► Loose cough, followed by tickling in the larynx and bronchial tubes, which renews the cough, [13] . ► Moist cough, difficult expectoration, and great debility, [13] . ► Cough, with yellow and thick expectoration, increased when waking, and followed by pains in the lungs, particularly the left, when coughing, and during a deep inspiration, [13] . ► Respiration. [600.] ► Breathing short and hurried, much worse on attempting to lie down, [16] . ► Great difficulty in breathing, [2] . ► Great difficulty in breathing, accompanied by a peculiar incessant sighing, [12] . ► Attacks of suffocation and oppression of the chest, with crying screams and restlessness. (Nervous attack, hysteria), [13] . ► Feels suffocated, oppressed at the chest; followed by crying and screams, without a cause, [13] . ► Feels suffocated on account of so much laughing, [13] . ► Suffocation; violent and painful palpitation, causing great anxiety, [13] . ► Suffocation, constant want of air, beating of the heart, ceasing suddenly, then the patient thinks he is going to die, [13] .

chest.text: CHEST. ► Murmurs in the chest, and palpitation of the heart, with alternate acceleration and suspension of the movements of the heart, [13] . ► Cutting pain in the left lung and heart, with pain in the tonsils, and necessity of stretching, [13] . [610.] ► Painful feeling at the base of both lungs, when coughing or inhaling, [13] . ► Chest expands with difficulty, [13] . ► Constriction of the chest, [4] . ► Oppression of the chest, with rheumatic pains and debility; these pains flew from the chest to the stomach, from the uterus to the limbs, etc., and vice versâ , with weakness in the arms, preventing work. (Bovista relieved), [13] . ► Oppression in the chest, with headache, burning heat, general perspiration, sadness, with palpitation and desire to cry, [13] . ► When waking, after a quiet sleep, oppression, with pain in the left side of chest, [13] . ► Oppression in the chest, with cough and prostration, till 9 A.M., when the headache increases extending to the neck and throat, with stiffness of the muscles of these parts. (These symptoms appeared in the morning, when waking, preceded by sadness, trembling, and headache), [13] . ► *Great oppression in the chest; panting respiration , palpitation, and prostration, [13] . ► Pain and oppression in the chest, worse when raising the arms, with the sensation as if a blow was received at the base of left lung. Repeated coughing, with desire to raise sputa, which was bloody. Oppression and panting respiration at the slightest movement. Lying on the left side is unbearable, and produces suffocation, and necessity of sitting up in bed. A the same time an exaggerated resonance is detected by percussion, at the anterior part of the base of the left lung. (The symptoms resembled much those produced by a cavity. Relieved by Bovista), [13] . ► Muscular pains in the whole chest, particularly on the left side; becoming worse and pressive, when touched in the left mammary region, [13] . [620.] ► Constrictive pain in the chest and head, as if a blow was received there, [13] . ► Rheumatic pain in the anterior and middle part of the chest, extending to both sides, with acute pain in the hypochondrium and umbilical region, [13] . ► Acute pain in the anterior and inferior part of the chest, towards the left side, with crossness, and fixed ideas, [13] . ► Pressive pain in the muscles of the anterior part of the chest, [13] . ► Towards evening, constant stinging pain, very severe in the interior of the chest, between the fourth and fifth ribs; worse by lying on the affected side, and by deep inspiration; better after sleeping. The pain is followed by bitter taste, and gastric symptoms, [13] . ► Pain in the anterior and lateral walls of the chest, with cough, sad countenance, indifference, and disgust for everything, [13] . ► Pain in the right side, towards evening with a smarting sensation, [13] . ► Pain in the right side, towards evening, with a very disagreeable sensation, lessening when sitting and pressing on the parts, [13] . ► Pain under left false ribs, followed by dryness and smarting in the throat, [13] . ► Cramplike pains in the left false ribs, with cough and difficult expectoration when rising, causing nausea, [13] . [630.] ► Cramplike pain in the left side of the chest, with necessity of striking himself, and scratching his face and neck; at the same time yawning, stretching, and necessity of putting the fingers in his mouth, [13] . ► Pain in the subclavian, with cold feet, [13] . ► Pressive pain in the left side of chest, with tearing in the stomach, great thirst and restlessness, [13] . ► Pressive pain in the left side of chest, and in the left subclavian, with the sensation as if it was distended, [13] . ► Shooting in the left side in the morning, [13] . ► Shooting pain in the region of the left subclavian, with sensation as if stretched and shooting in the heart at times; palpitation and slight murmur at the same time, tearing pain in the stomach for several hours, and shooting in the spleen, [13] . ► Mammæ. ► Swelling of the breasts, with itching in the nipples, [13] .

heart.text: HEART AND PULSE. ► PRÆCORDIAL. ► Diseases of the heart and particularly of the circulatory system, become worse after wetting the hands, in cold water, [13] . ► Inability to lie down on account of the extreme anguish it caused in the præcordial region; did not retire to bed nor sleep for four nights, [16] . ► *Præcordial anxiety, tumultuous beating of the heart , [13] . [640.] ► Præcordial anxiety; the movements of the heart are not felt (after a moral shock), [13] . ► Violent anguish of the heart, [2] , [4] . ► Oppression and pain in the heart, as if a misfortune had happened, with weeping and moaning, followed by cramps and coldness in the inferior extremities, [13] . ► Pain in the heart, as if squeezed or compressed, also in the aorta, under the left clavicle, and carotids; with violent throbbing of these arteries and heart, [13] . ► Pain, as if the heart and aorta were torn, with a tingling sensation, [13] . ► Severe pain in the aorta, extending to the subclavian, as if it was going to burst, with slight beating of the heart, [13] . ► Sensation as if the heart turned or twisted around, with pain in the chest, and general perspiration. (Relieved by Bovista), [13] . ► Painful compressed feeling in the heart, with severe headache, bitter mouth and thirst, [13] . ► Pressive pain in the heart and aorta, with violent throbbing, [13] . ► Pressive pain in the whole region of the heart, with severe headache, and a great deal of moaning in the night, [13] . [650.] ► Pressive pain in the region of the heart, worse by touching, [13] . ► Shooting pain in the heart and arteries of the left side of the chest, extending to the left arm. The sensibility of these parts is so increased, that the contact with the dress is very painful, [13] . ► Heart's Action. ► Palpitation, with sadness, inclined to tears, oppression, headache, with general perspiration and burning heat, [13] . ► Palpitation of the heart, without any known cause, [13] . ► Palpitation of the heart, with great oppression, panting respiration headache, and prostration, [13] . ► Palpitation of the heart, stitches interfering with breathing; pain in the back, painful feeling in the spinal column, [13] . ► Severe palpitation, with murmur in the heart, [13] . ► Great irregularity in the circulation, [13] . ► The circulation of the blood, judging by the pulse, is alternately increased and diminished, [13] . ► Painful throbbing of the carotids, with fulness in the head, especially in the region of the medulla oblongata, relieved by the epistaxis, [16] . [660.] ► Trembling of the heart, and thumping, as when frightened, or when hearing bad news, [13] . ► Pulse. ► Hard and frequent pulse, [13] . ► Irregular pulse, [11] .

back.text: NECK AND BACK. ► Neck. ► Rigidity of the neck, being so painful that he cannot move without screaming from pain, [13] . ► Rigidity of the neck, with a great deal of pain, and inability to turn the head; violent pain in the forehead, as if encircled by a band of iron, [13] . ► In the morning, when turning the head, pain in both sides of neck, and from that time until night pain in the left side of neck when turning the head to the right, [13] . ► Neck felt sore, [15] . ► All the muscles of the neck and back are so painful, that movement is impossible, [13] . ► Pain in the neck and back, followed by general paralysis, [13] . ► Back. ► Distortion of the vertebral column (result of rachitis), with commencing paraplegia, [13] . [670.] ► A swelling, kind of a tumor or rheumatoid prominence on the vertebral column, with labored respiration, pain in the limbs, and sleeplessness (in a person of 14 or 15 years), [13] . ► A tumor near the middle of the vertebral column, with numbness of the inferior extremities, [13] . ► Narrowing of the vertebral canal, the result of venereal and scorbutic affections, [13] . ► Pain in the back, from morning till next day, [13] . ► Dorsal. ► Pain in the scapulæ, [13] . ► Shooting pain under the scapulæ, [13] . ► Shooting pain in the scapulæ and abdomen, [13] . ► Towards evening, sharp shooting pain under the left scapula, causing him to scream, and leaving a dull pain; movement brought on the shooting pain; after some hours the pain descended under the false ribs; the pain and shooting reappeared during the night, when moving or turning, but did not interfere with sleep, [13] . ► Pain along the middle of the back, as after receiving a lash, [13] . ► Lumbar. ► Shooting in the left side above the hip, at 9 P.M., [13] . [680.] ► Acute convulsive pains in the left inferior part of the vertebral column at the appearance of the catamenia, ceasing with it, [13] . ► Violent pains in the lumbar region; paralysis of the inferior extremities, and suppression of the urine (result of concussion of the spinal column), [13] . ► Pain in the lumbar region as soon as menstruation commences, [13] . ► Repeated lancinating, shooting pains in the coccyx, [13] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Tarent.

upper_extremities.text: SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Heaviness in the superior extremities one hour after taking the medicine, [13] . ► Pain in the right arm, [13] . ► Pain in the left arm, [13] . ► In the forenoon, pain in the left arm and hand, as if strongly squeezed, [13] . ► Slight pains in the middle and external parts of the arms and forearms, on the inferior surface of the wrists, and superior part of fingers, [13] . ► Shoulder. ► Pain in the shoulder-joint, as if its ligaments were relaxed, with slight tickling in the stomach, [13] . ► Arm. ► Painful and burning sensation in the upper part of the arms, their internal aspect; in the middle of the forearms; in the left knee and calf, with anxiety, restlessness, and crossness, [13] . ► Forearm. ► At noon, shooting in the flexure of the left arm, [13] . ► Pain from the flexure of the arm to the hand, at noon, [13] . [700.] ► Pain in the anterior and inferior parts of the left arm, increased by carrying the hand to the left shoulder, [13] . ► Wrist. ► Pain and swelling of the wrists, [13] . ► At night, pain in the left wrist when pressed, or when making use of it; continued several days, [13] . ► Towards noon, shooting in the right wrist; renewed in the evening, [13] . ► Hand. ► Restlessness of the hands; movements as if knitting, followed by a marked general shaking, particularly of the inferior extremities (Arsen. 8000th checked these symptoms), [13] . ► Necessity of moving the hands and fingers, together with general malaise (relieved by Cocculus), [13] . ► Painful sensation on the palmar and dorsal surfaces of both hands, with pain in the head, burning in the abdomen, sadness, and indifference, [13] . ► In the night, lancinating pain in the external border of the right hand, [13] . ► Shooting, lancinating pains in border of left hand, [13] . ► Fingers. ► Unbearable pains in the thumbs, particularly the right, relieved by pressure, [13] . [710.] ► In the evening, pain in the left thumb, [13] . ► Pain in the right little finger when using it, [13] . ► Pain in the right little finger, extending to the forearm, [13] .

lower_extremities.text: INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Paralysis of lower limbs; violent pain in the back, that the least movement makes unbearable, [13] . ► Complete paralysis of the lower limbs; inability to move them on account of the pain. Hard and frequent pulse, [13] . ► *Great restlessness and agitation, particularly of the inferior extremities, with desire to cry and restlessness , [13] . ► Weakness of the lower limbs, dulness of mind, general prostration, obscuration of sight, and immobility, [13] . ► Since sunset, great fatigue and pain in the lower extremities, particularly in the left thigh and hip, as after a very long walk, or like the rheumatic pains felt before a change of weather, [13] . ► Numbness of the inferior extremities, followed by paralysis, [13] . ► Numbness of the lower extremities, changing to a conclusive retraction of the muscles, [13] . ► Hip. generalities.text:
GENERALITIES. ► A few hours after the bite the patients have great anguish of the heart, great dejection, but greater difficulty in breathing; they complain in a mournful voice, roll their eyes, and when asked by bystanders where they suffer, they either do not reply or point out the affected region by placing the hand upon the chest, as if the heart were affected more than all else. The symptoms observed after the bite of a tarentula are not constant and common to each person, neither are they all produced by each tarantula, but they vary according to the variety of the tarentula, the temperament of the diseased person, and the greater or less summer heat. It has been observed that tarentulas in the more northern region of Apulia are fiercer; the bitten people suffer severe symptoms; especially they are charmed by various colors, green, blue, etc., but rarely by dark colors. And if approached by people dressed in a strong color, which is unpleasant to them, they must retire; for at sight of the annoying color they are immediately seized with anguish of heart and renewal of the symptoms. Different symptoms are produced by different varieties of tarentulas. The tarentula subalbida causes slight pain, followed by itching, sharp pain in the abdomen and diarrha. The tarentula stellata causes more severe pain and itching, stupor, heaviness and pain in the head, trembling of the whole body, etc. The tarentula uvea causes, besides the above symptoms, swelling, great pain in the bitten part, spasm, chill, cold perspiration over the whole body, aphonia, inclination to vomit, tension of the trunk and chest, distension of the abdomen, etc. There are numerous and incredible symptoms of tarentula, many of which seem dependent on a depraved imagination; it will not be far from the truth if we report that after the intense severity of the symptoms apparent on the first days has declined, there is a peculiar melancholy, a bending forward of the neck, until either by dancing, or music, or by change of age the poisonous characteristics are eliminated from the blood and nervous fluids, which fortune is rarely attained, for having once been bitten, it is certainly evident that they cannot be restored to health. Many symptoms confirm this assertion of the nature of the depraved fancy; for many have sought the sepulchre and lonely places, and even extended themselves upon the bier. Desperate, they court dissolution. Maidens and wives, otherwise virtuous, the restraints of modesty being loosed, sigh deeply, howl, make indecent gestures, expose their sexual organs, are fond of pensile movements, etc., some at length twist about in their own garments, and take excessive delight in such movements. Others like to strike with whips on the buttocks, heels, feet, back, etc. Others have a great desire to run. Also strange fancies in regard to colors are observed; for people bitten by tarentulas are charmed by some colors, and on the contrary, greatly repelled by others, and according to the degree of the perverted fancy in turn, refreshed and made miserable by various colors, [1] . ► Stretched upon the ground and seemed as if he was just going to expire. When he heard the music he began to move accordingly, got up as quick as lightning, and seemed as if he had been awakened by some frightful vision, and stared wildly about, still moving every joint of his body. As I had not yet learned the whole tune, I left off playing; in an instant he fell down and cried very loud; his face, legs, arms, and every other part of his body were distorted; he scraped the earth with his hands, and was in such contortions, that clearly indicated him to be in miserable agonies. On hearing the music again, he rose up as he did before, and danced as fast as any man could do; his dancing was very wild; he kept a perfect time in the dance, but had neither rule nor manner, only jumping and running to and fro, and making very comical postures, something like the Chinese dances seen on the stage, and otherwise, everything that he did was very wild, [9] . ► He immediately felt intense pain in the bitten spot, and fell to the ground with coldness of the body; with bristling of the hair, pain in the chest, tension of the trunk, the legs were weak, he sighed, complained, said that he was suffocating, wished to cry out, but could not. The next morning he was taken by his neighbors to the town where music was called in; he immediately began to dance, he was bathed in perspiration, was sleepless for a week, drank pure wine; did not evacuate the bowels for four days, desired nothing, wished to be bathed with water, liked a red color, pursuing with the greatest hatred anything blue, which he tore to pieces and trampled under foot. At night he held his heels in his hand to scratch them in which manner he was able to get a little sleep; he ate little or nothing; but dancing for almost a week, he was cured by the perspiration and music, [7] . ► The tarentula being killed, he returned home, but on the way suddenly felt to the ground, as if struck by apoplexy, followed by shortness of breath, blackness of the face, hands, and other extremities, etc. The patient revived as he heard music, began to sigh, moved first his feet, then his hands and the rest of his body, and soon after, on being raised to his feet, danced vigorously, with sighs so deep as almost to frighten the bystanders. He rolled upon the ground, and kicked vigorously. In two hours from the beginning of the music he had entirely lost the blackness of the face and hands; the dance was repeated for three days, according to the custom, and he was entirely restored by the perspiration thus induced. Each year, about the time of the bite, pain reappeared in the affected part with all the above symptoms, in less intensity, however; and unless he anticipated the assailing paroxysm with music and dancing, he was suddenly seized with the same symptoms, whence, when thus attacked about the time of the bite, he was carried from the field by his companions and restored by a little music, [6] . ► Weakness of the legs, obscuration of sight, vertigo, cramps in the stomach, going upwards, without vomiting, coldness, cannot get warm, with an earthy gray, or bluish hue of the face, [13] . [760.] ► Malaise vertigo, stupor, violent cramps in the stomach, causing gagging without vomiting, coldness and livid face; sweat at the root of the hair; fever, with a furious delirium, [13] . ► Malaise, vertigo, cramps in the stomach, painful coldness, earthy paleness of face; fever and intense heat afterwards, with dryness and sensitiveness of the skin, [13] . ► General symptoms due to scrofula, [13] . ► General and local dropsy, [13] . ► A tendency to rachitis in scrofulous constitutions, [13] . ► Rachitism due to syphilis, [13] . ► Diseases of the bones, in general, [13] . ► General and almost sudden dema; feels oppressed and suffocated; anxiety; the teeth are clenched; nervous symptoms, [13] . ► Weakened constitution by frequent uterine looses; hysteric symptoms; hepatic spots on the neck, and sometimes on the cheeks, [13] . ► Retraction of one or more muscles, [13] . [770.] ► Retraction of the muscles. General muscular atrophy, [13] . ► Retraction of the muscles; the mouth and eyes are distorted, with a general sensation as if the body was smaller and atrophied, [13] . ► Half of the body seems as if atrophied, with retraction of the muscles; the head and back are drawn strongly towards the hip, [13] . ► Tension and rigidity of the muscles of the entire trunk; inability to move the head, the arms, and even the upper half of the body. The muscles seemed shortened, [13] . ► Attack of paralysis, characterized by a general formication, which begins at 8 P.M., with a strong pain in the occiput, followed by numbness of the trunk and limbs, to such a degree as to completely lose all movements. Natrum mur. was given as an antidote; immediately after, general agitation, fear of losing the reason, which also happens; biting and scratching himself with rage. Phosph. ac. was given, and this state ceased. Feels thirsty afterward, yawning, rigors, and shaking, with headache, [13] . ► General twitching, especially violent in the arms, alternating with opisthotonos, [12] . ► *Trembling of the body; all the limbs are agitated , [13] . ► Her whole body was shaken by a spasm of such violence that two strong men could hardly hold her, [2] . ► Convulsive trembling of half of the body, [13] . ► Convulsions and subsultus in all his limbs; the penis erect, and the abdominal muscles in such a state of contraction and rigidity that they might have been aptly compared to a piece of leather, [10] . [780.] ► Convulsions, resulting from compression on the spinal column, involuntary stools, [13] . ► Convulsions, caused by pressure on the spine, paralysis, complete retention of the urine and fæces, [13] . ► Convulsions, caused by pressure on the spinal column, with involuntary stool, [13] . ► Convulsions, resulting from compression of the spinal column; complete retention of fecal matters and urine, [13] . ► Extraordinary contortions and movements of the head and hands, [13] . ► Convulsive spasms, rolling on the ground, teeth clenched; it seems as if breathing was interrupted; a rattling, hoarse sound from the throat, [13] . ► Spasms in general, [13] . ► Spasms, starts, general trembling, a bluish tinge of the skin (not cyanosis), gooseflesh coldness, and screams, [13] . ► *St. Vitus's dance , [13] . ► Great weakness and prostration, with general lowness of spirits, lassitude, and pains in the hip-joints, wrists, and finger-joints, [13] . [790.] ► Could hardly be moved from side to side, on account of the great weakness, uninterrupted constriction of the chest and anguish of the heart, [4] . ► Malaise, constant thirst, craving for raw articles, [13] . ► Music produces malaise, ennui, and restlessness, with contractions of the fingers, and necessity of moving them, [13] . ► Universal languor, [4] . ► Complete relaxation and general prostration of strength, with heavy drowsiness. (Relieved by Carbo veg. 200th), [13] . ► General lassitude on getting up, lasting the whole day, with hoarseness; weakness, with little moral or physical inclination to work, [13] . ► General fatigue, passing an excessive amount of urine, [13] . ► Fatigue, uneasiness, constant movements of the arms, legs, and trunk, and impossibility of doing anything or of keeping quiet, [13] . ► Complete prostration of strength, [10] . ► Great prostration and pains, as if the whole body was bruised, [13] . [800.] ► *Great restlessness, could not keep quiet anywhere, or in any position; felt that I must keep in motion, though walking aggravated all the symptoms , [16] . ► *Restlessness, cannot remain in one place; uneasiness without a cause; apprehension, followed by vertigo, is compelled to sit down; chills, malaise, increasing fever becoming intense, with great excitement, gesticulations, redness of the cheeks, eyes sparkling in an extraordinary manner, [13] . ► *Restlessness, excitement, passion; irresistible desire of moving the legs, [13] . ► Uneasiness, malaise, dissatisfaction, ennui, need of moving the head, [13] . ► *Has to change position , has to sit down on the floor and move constantly. Is obliged to cry, with great restlessness, especially in lower extremities. This state is preceded by malaise and oppression , [13] . ► *Need of constantly moving the hands, feet, and head , [13] . ► Debility, syncope, with effusion or dema of the legs and abdominal walls, [13] . ► Syncope, nervous crisis, with crying and screaming; general dema, [13] . [810.] ► Oppression, malaise, continual movements of the arms, legs, and trunk; impossibility of doing anything, or of keeping quiet, [13] . ► The muscles of the whole body seem as if they were shorter; the pains are unbearable; slight fever, [13] . ► Difficulty of walking, on account of pains; extreme debility; thirst; want of appetite; after eating, the lassitude continued, but with gayety and desire to laugh, lasting till bedtime, followed by sadness; quiet sleeping, though accompanied with dreams, [13] . ► During a walk a disagreeable sensation, as is experienced after a shock or a fright; this lasted about half an hour, and was followed by great weakness, [13] . ► Muscular pains after wetting the hands in cold water, [13] . ► General pains, particularly of the bones of the arms, [13] . ► General pains, but principally located in the bones of the arms, [13] . ► Pains, with gouty swellings, [13] . ► Some pain and swelling, [14] . ► On being urged to dance, she replied with tears that she could not, on account of the violence of the pain in the joints of the feet and total loss of strength, [2] . [820.] ► Pain in the right inferior maxillary nerve, with a painful sensation in the left elbow-joint, as if the ligaments were relaxed. A few minutes after, slight rumbling in the sigmoid flexure, accompanied with a marked increase of heat in the stomach, ascending towards the thoracic cavity, with increased perspiration. Six minutes after, tendency to sleep, with painful headache and paleness; eight minutes after feels the head relieved, but pain in the nerves of the left internal surface of superior lip, with throbbing; eleven minutes after, slight pains in the stomach, in its great curvature. When these symptoms passed off, great sleepiness, heaviness above the eyes, and shooting pain in the left ischiatic tuberosity, [13] . ► He immediately yelled and fell down; they carried him to the house in agonies; terrible smarting pain, hot and cold, starting from the bite to the small of the back, and from there returning to the bite; this alternating pain continued all night, [15] . ► Wandering pains, relieved by warm frictions, [13] . ► Pains changing and flying from place to place, in the shoulders, back, arms, and knees, etc., and are relieved somewhat by warm frictions, [13] . ► Arthritic pains , [13] . ► Strong, sharp prickings on different parts of the body, which compel to jump or start, with contractions of the lateral muscles of the neck; sore throat; pain in all the teeth, as if they were burning. All these symptoms increase when seeing others in trouble, with noise, talking, and from the smoke of tobacco, [13] . ► There is marked periodicity in the symptoms, [13] . ► Having seen the bite of a rattlesnake successfully antidoted by large doses of whiskey, I drank about two fluid ounces, but had no wish to repeat the dose, as it produced a very decided aggravation of all the symptoms, [16] . ► The symptoms steadily increased in severity until they reached their acme, then as steadily decreased, without any remissions or periodicity, [16] . ► Every year at the time of the bite, all the symptoms returned, pain in the bitten part, with a red color, etc. All the symptoms were removed by the dance, [2] . SUPPLEMENT: TARENTULA. ► J. Heber Smith, M.D., New England Med. Gaz., New Ser., vol. i, 1879, p. 139. The tarentula by which Dr. Sherman was poisoned, came through the mail, and decomposition had undoubtedly commenced at the time the virus was imbibed into the system, and hence the symptoms in his case were such as might come from the scalpel or any other kind of animal poisoning, and therefore the symptoms reported cannot be reliable. (See authority, No. 16, in Vol. IX, of the Encyclopedia). Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Tarent.

fever.text: FEVER. ► Chilliness. ► After an access of insanity, general chill, severe shaking, horripilation, chattering of the teeth, compressive headache, burning thirst, with fear of drinking water, which he craves afterward, [13] . ► After a new attack of insanity, the chill and yawning of the preceding fevers repeated (checked by Alumina), [13] . ► *Chills and shivering during several hours; gnawing stinging pains in the kidneys; lancinating pains in the limbs; headache, with buzzing in the ears; at 7 P.M., severe chill, compelling to lie down, to get warm, getting warm with difficulty at the end of two hours; fever during all night, and the next day feels chilly; easy vomiting of bile, in the morning. This fever also appeared at the end of the proving, [13] . ► *Constant chill and coldness during four days, except in the nights, when she sleeps; feels broken down, as if bruised all over, particularly when moving; the first two days, pains in the legs and head; the second, bilious vomiting, in the morning; the fourth day, at the same hour and lying down, slight sweat. This fever was complicated besides with coryza and cough, and repeated at the end of the proving; after this fever, the woman felt heavy and dejected for eight days, during which time she had the eyes inflamed and the eyelids agglutinated, in the morning, [13] . ► When waking up, severe chill and general shaking, chattering of the teeth, bruised feeling all over, particularly in left side of chest, followed by a burning heat and sour perspiration afterwards; then sleeps and dreams he was at a river border looking at the flowing water, but when looking up to the sky he became sad; seminal emissions, [13] . ► Rigors were among the first symptoms noticed; chills began in the lumbar region and spread over the whole body, aggravated by the slightest draft of cold air; coldness of the whole body; increase of artificial heat produced chilliness; could not keep warm, though sitting beside a hot stove or over a register almost constantly, [15] . ► Shivering, increased heat, frequent pulse, stupefaction and headache, smarting in the eyes, thirst for cold water, but the stomach refuses it; anorexia and heat in the abdomen, [13] . ► Shivering, horripilation and general shaking, icy coldness, yawning, violent thirst, with need of stretching; compressive headache; symptoms like the first stage of intermittent, lasting one hour, followed by pain in the heart, as if it would jump out of its place; pain in the left arm, followed by muscular weakness, heat, and cough; fever, with a scorching heat, intense thirst, pain in the left arm, dryness of the mouth, oppression, panting, and dyspna, [13] . [930.] ► Alternating cold and heat, with some acute pain in the region of the liver. (This state was preceded by headache and increased heat), [13] . ► General coldness and shaking, very marked in the inferior extremities; it seems as if the ligaments of the hip and knee-joints contract and relax rapidly, producing a cracking noise, together with a very profuse sweat. (These symptoms were relieved with Arsenicum 8000th), [13] . ► Chills on the back, lasting one hour, followed by pain in the whole head and in the great toe of the right foot, [13] . ► The inferior extremities are cold, with cramps, after having felt a pain in the heart, with oppression and moaning, [13] . ► Cold in the feet, followed by a general chill, with yawning, [13] . ► Heat. ► Quotidian febrile state, consisting in increased heat, frequent pulse, heat in the palms of the hands, and desire of lying down all the time, with exaggerated ideas about his disease, or a mania to show that he is very sick, though his complaint is a slight one, [13] . ► Burning heat, intense thirst, profuse sweat, and great desire to sleep without succeeding, on account of nervous agitation, [13] . ► Scorching heat in the whole body, alternating with an icy coldness , which causes shaking and repeats often; feet constantly cold, [13] . ► Burning heat through the whole body, alternating with an intense coldness that causes trembling and shaking, and repeats several times; feet constantly cold , [13] . ► Scorching heat of the skin, which is of scarlet color ; intense burning thirst; headache, with pains all over the body, as if bruised, lasting one hour; afterwards, profuse general perspiration and strong smell of fever, with amelioration of the headache, thirst and pains; sleep during the heat and sweat, [13] . [940.] ► Burning heat in the interior of the body, with necessity of making contortions, [13] . ► Great heat through all the body, not detected by the touch, [13] . ► Heat and pain in the whole head, when waking up, [13] . ► General heat of the body for one day (third day), [13] . ► Burning heat in the head, face, and ears, with increased color of the latter; oppressive breathing and general uneasiness; twitching of the tendons, and unbearable bitterness in mouth and throat, with great dryness; need of moving the head from side to side, laterally rubbing it against something, [13] . ► Heat and burning of the head, flushed cheeks, and perspiration on the palms of the hands, [13] . ► Burning, scorching heat in the occiput, extending all over the posterior part of the head, [13] . ► Burning heat in the head, face, and throat, with restlessness and burning thirst, [13] . ► Sensation of heat in the face, [13] . ► Burning and sweating on the palmar surfaces of both hands, with scorching heat in the head, and flushed cheeks, [13] . ► Sweat. [950.] ► Debilitating sweats, with general malaise, [13] . ► Sweats at night, caused by difficult digestion, [13] . ► Cold sweat on the surface of his body, [10] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), On waking, heaviness of head; headache; lancinations in left side of head; pain in eyes and temples; pain in right eye; lancinating pain in left ear; on waking, pyrosis;
